ART-EMAIL-T001-00.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-00.body_excerpt: Team, we need to decide on the database for NovexCore v2. I'm leaning toward PostgreSQL for its JSON support and strong ACID guarantees. Thoughts?

ART-EMAIL-T001-01.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-01.body_excerpt: Agree on Postgres. We've used it in DataPipeline and it's been rock solid. MySQL is an option but Postgres has better window functions.

ART-EMAIL-T001-02.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-02.body_excerpt: I've benchmarked both. PostgreSQL wins on complex queries by ~30%. My recommendation: PostgreSQL.

ART-EMAIL-T001-03.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-03.body_excerpt: From a product angle, either works. I'll defer to engineering here.

ART-EMAIL-T001-04.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-04.body_excerpt: Decision made: we go with PostgreSQL for NovexCore v2. David, please update the ADR.

ART-EMAIL-T001-05.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-05.body_excerpt: Heads up: the cloud vendor deal gives us managed MySQL at 40% lower cost. Re-opening the DB decision.

ART-EMAIL-T001-06.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-06.body_excerpt: After cost review, we are switching to MySQL. I know this reverses our earlier decision — documenting the reason: vendor discount + ops simplicity.

ART-EMAIL-T001-07.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
ART-EMAIL-T001-07.body_excerpt: Understood. Will update migration scripts. Not ideal but makes sense economically.

ART-EMAIL-T002-00.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-00.body_excerpt: Found a bug: auth tokens never expire in AuthService. This is a security vulnerability. Assigning to Frank.

ART-EMAIL-T002-01.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-01.body_excerpt: Confirmed. Tokens issued before 2024-01-10 have no exp claim. Working on a fix now.

ART-EMAIL-T002-02.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-02.body_excerpt: I can force-rotate all tokens in prod as a hotfix. Risk: users get logged out. Worth it?

ART-EMAIL-T002-03.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-03.body_excerpt: Yes, force rotate. User disruption acceptable given security risk. Hector please proceed.

ART-EMAIL-T002-04.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-04.body_excerpt: Token rotation complete. 2,847 sessions invalidated. Monitoring for issues.

ART-EMAIL-T002-05.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
ART-EMAIL-T002-05.body_excerpt: Fix deployed: tokens now have 24h expiry. Added regression test. Closing.

ART-EMAIL-T003-00.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
ART-EMAIL-T003-00.body_excerpt: Sharing Q1 roadmap draft. Key items: (1) NovexCore v2 launch, (2) ReportingEngine beta, (3) InfraV2 Kubernetes migration. Please review by Friday.

ART-EMAIL-T003-01.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
ART-EMAIL-T003-01.body_excerpt: Engineering capacity looks tight. NovexCore v2 and Kubernetes migration in same quarter is risky. Can we push InfraV2 to Q2?

ART-EMAIL-T003-02.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
ART-EMAIL-T003-02.body_excerpt: Agreed with Grace. InfraV2 moves to Q2. NovexCore v2 stays Q1. Carol, update the roadmap.

ART-EMAIL-T003-03.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
ART-EMAIL-T003-03.body_excerpt: Updated. Q1: NovexCore v2 + ReportingEngine beta. Q2: InfraV2 migration.

ART-EMAIL-T004-00.subject: Re: Re: Q1 roadmap sync
ART-EMAIL-T004-00.body_excerpt:
Forwarding Carol's roadmap update for the data team. Key: NovexCore v2 in Q1 means we need DataPipeline connectors ready by March 1.

--- Forwarded ---
Updated. Q1: NovexCore v2 + ReportingEngine beta. Q2: InfraV2 migration.

ART-EMAIL-T005-00.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
ART-EMAIL-T005-00.body_excerpt: We need an event streaming solution for the analytics pipeline. Evaluating Kafka and RabbitMQ.

ART-EMAIL-T005-01.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
ART-EMAIL-T005-01.body_excerpt: Kafka is the clear choice for high-throughput. We're talking millions of events/day. RabbitMQ would struggle.

ART-EMAIL-T005-02.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
ART-EMAIL-T005-02.body_excerpt: Agreed on Kafka. I've set up a POC. Throughput: 850k msg/sec. Latency p99: 12ms. Very promising.

ART-EMAIL-T005-03.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
ART-EMAIL-T005-03.body_excerpt: Decision: Kafka for event streaming in DataPipeline. James to lead implementation.

ART-EMAIL-T006-00.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
ART-EMAIL-T006-00.body_excerpt: Opening a Senior Backend Engineer role. Requirements: Go or Python, distributed systems experience, Kafka a plus. JD attached.

ART-EMAIL-T006-01.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
ART-EMAIL-T006-01.body_excerpt: Approved. Let's aim to have someone onboarded by Q2.

ART-EMAIL-T006-02.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
ART-EMAIL-T006-02.body_excerpt: Update: 3 strong candidates. Moving to final interviews.

ART-EMAIL-T006-03.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
ART-EMAIL-T006-03.body_excerpt: Offer extended to Candidate A. Joining April 1.

ART-EMAIL-T007-00.subject: On-call rotation changes
ART-EMAIL-T007-00.body_excerpt: Proposing new on-call rotation: 1-week shifts, 4-person pool. Current 2-person rotation is burning people out.

ART-EMAIL-T007-01.subject: On-call rotation changes
ART-EMAIL-T007-01.body_excerpt: Fully support this. Let's implement immediately.

ART-EMAIL-T007-02.subject: On-call rotation changes
ART-EMAIL-T007-02.body_excerpt: Approved. Hector please set up PagerDuty.

ART-EMAIL-T007-03.subject: On-call rotation changes
ART-EMAIL-T007-03.body_excerpt: PagerDuty rotation configured. New schedule starts Monday.

ART-EMAIL-T009-00.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
ART-EMAIL-T009-00.body_excerpt: Proposing upgrade from Python 3.10 to 3.12 across all services. ~15% performance improvement on benchmarks.

ART-EMAIL-T009-01.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
ART-EMAIL-T009-01.body_excerpt: Tested on AuthService — no breaking changes. +18% on crypto operations.

ART-EMAIL-T009-02.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
ART-EMAIL-T009-02.body_excerpt: ReportingEngine has one dependency (legacy-stats 1.2) not 3.12 compatible. Need to replace it first.

ART-EMAIL-T009-03.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
ART-EMAIL-T009-03.body_excerpt: I'll handle the legacy-stats replacement — ETA 1 week.

ART-EMAIL-T009-04.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
ART-EMAIL-T009-04.body_excerpt: All services now on Python 3.12. legacy-stats replaced with statslib. Upgrade complete.

ART-EMAIL-T010-00.subject: Cross-post: All-hands notes Jan 30
ART-EMAIL-T010-00.body_excerpt:
Notes from today's all-hands:
- NovexCore v2 on track for Feb 28
- MySQL migration underway (yes, we switched from Postgres)
- New hire joins April 1
- Q2 focus: InfraV2 Kubernetes migration

ART-EMAIL-T011-00.subject: Re: All-hands notes Jan 30
ART-EMAIL-T011-00.body_excerpt:
Forwarding to the engineering team.

Key engineering items:
- NovexCore v2 Feb 28 deadline
- MySQL migration underway
- New hire April 1

--- Original ---
Notes from today's all-hands:
- NovexCore v2 on track for Feb 28
- MySQL migration underway
- New hire joins April 1

ART-EMAIL-T012-00.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
ART-EMAIL-T012-00.body_excerpt: Detected 3x slowdown in ReportingEngine after last deploy. P99 latency went from 200ms to 650ms.

ART-EMAIL-T012-01.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
ART-EMAIL-T012-01.body_excerpt: Bisected to commit a3f9d. The new analytics aggregation query is doing a full table scan. Missing index.

ART-EMAIL-T012-02.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
ART-EMAIL-T012-02.body_excerpt: Fix deployed: added composite index on (tenant_id, created_at). P99 back to 185ms.

ART-EMAIL-T012-03.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
ART-EMAIL-T012-03.body_excerpt: Confirmed. Performance restored. Post-mortem due Friday.

ART-I001.subject: Implement JWT authentication
ART-I001.body_excerpt: Implement JWT-based auth for all NovexCore v2 API endpoints. Tokens must have 24h expiry.

ART-I001-CMT-2318ba6e4f6c07b9.subject: Comment on Implement JWT authentication
ART-I001-CMT-2318ba6e4f6c07b9.body_excerpt: Working on this. Using python-jose library.

ART-I001-CMT-77da4bb3eb1f4ac8.subject: Comment on Implement JWT authentication
ART-I001-CMT-77da4bb3eb1f4ac8.body_excerpt: PR raised: #42. Includes unit tests and integration tests.

ART-I001-CMT-b030f9e471790ad7.subject: Comment on Implement JWT authentication
ART-I001-CMT-b030f9e471790ad7.body_excerpt: Reviewed and approved. Tests pass. Closing.

ART-I002.subject: Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
ART-I002.body_excerpt: Migrate NovexCore v2 from PostgreSQL to MySQL following cost-driven decision reversal. See email thread T001.

ART-I002-CMT-2422c8de40f1fca0.subject: Comment on Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
ART-I002-CMT-2422c8de40f1fca0.body_excerpt: Starting migration. Using Alembic for schema migrations.

ART-I002-CMT-7720d01a79496a44.subject: Comment on Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
ART-I002-CMT-7720d01a79496a44.body_excerpt: Compatibility issue: PostgreSQL JSONB → MySQL JSON. Need to audit all JSONB queries.

ART-I002-CMT-201c1e6ff216b412.subject: Comment on Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
ART-I002-CMT-201c1e6ff216b412.body_excerpt: All queries updated. Running full regression suite.

ART-I002-CMT-f359b91eaceef62c.subject: Comment on Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
ART-I002-CMT-f359b91eaceef62c.body_excerpt: Migration complete. All tests pass. Closing.

ART-I003.subject: Security: tokens never expire
ART-I003.body_excerpt: CRITICAL: Auth tokens missing exp claim. All tokens issued before 2024-01-10 are permanent. Immediate fix required.

ART-I003-CMT-eed00dd53ce592a9.subject: Comment on Security: tokens never expire
ART-I003-CMT-eed00dd53ce592a9.body_excerpt: Rotating all tokens in prod as emergency hotfix.

ART-I003-CMT-f7c7588ef90aac4b.subject: Comment on Security: tokens never expire

ART-I004.subject: Integrate Kafka for event streaming
ART-I004.body_excerpt: Implement Kafka producer/consumer for DataPipeline analytics events. Target: 1M msg/sec throughput.

ART-I004-CMT-fb01a024ab8016b7.subject: Comment on Integrate Kafka for event streaming
ART-I004-CMT-fb01a024ab8016b7.body_excerpt: Setting up Kafka cluster on K8s.

ART-I004-CMT-390da3585ac84f62.subject: Comment on Integrate Kafka for event streaming
ART-I004-CMT-390da3585ac84f62.body_excerpt: POC complete. 850k msg/sec achieved. Raising PR.

ART-I004-CMT-75f141e3f92b9185.subject: Comment on Integrate Kafka for event streaming
ART-I004-CMT-75f141e3f92b9185.body_excerpt: Reviewed. Schema registry integration needed before merge.

ART-I004-CMT-f85b3bbfa599b9fe.subject: Comment on Integrate Kafka for event streaming

ART-I005.subject: Kubernetes migration planning
ART-I005.body_excerpt: Plan and execute migration of all services to Kubernetes. Originally Q1 — deferred to Q2 per roadmap decision.

ART-I005-CMT-7f9d1dc199f95821.subject: Comment on Kubernetes migration planning
ART-I005-CMT-7f9d1dc199f95821.body_excerpt: Deferring to Q2 per Alice's decision in roadmap sync.

ART-I006.subject: Performance regression: 3x latency spike
ART-I006.body_excerpt: P99 latency spiked from 200ms to 650ms after deploy on day 40.

ART-I006-CMT-53ad0a2d6f4d8752.subject: Comment on Performance regression: 3x latency spike
ART-I006-CMT-53ad0a2d6f4d8752.body_excerpt: Root cause: missing index on (tenant_id, created_at).

ART-I006-CMT-6d5713d25f67e913.subject: Comment on Performance regression: 3x latency spike
ART-I006-CMT-6d5713d25f67e913.body_excerpt: Fix deployed. P99 at 185ms — better than before.

ART-I006-CMT-41ae84198d656223.subject: Comment on Performance regression: 3x latency spike

ART-I007.subject: Python 3.12 upgrade
ART-I007.body_excerpt: Upgrade all NovexCore services from Python 3.10 to 3.12. Blocker: replace legacy-stats 1.2.

ART-I007-CMT-634597f97262c704.subject: Comment on Python 3.12 upgrade
ART-I007-CMT-634597f97262c704.body_excerpt: Replacing legacy-stats with statslib. ETA 1 week.

ART-I007-CMT-a8cfa60872a96d50.subject: Comment on Python 3.12 upgrade
ART-I007-CMT-a8cfa60872a96d50.body_excerpt: statslib integrated. All tests pass on 3.12.

ART-I008.subject: Add refresh token support
ART-I008.body_excerpt: Implement refresh token flow. Access tokens: 24h. Refresh tokens: 30 days, single-use.

ART-I008-CMT-46d0dac1464edc05.subject: Comment on Add refresh token support
ART-I008-CMT-46d0dac1464edc05.body_excerpt: Implementing. Using Redis for refresh token storage.

ART-I008-CMT-87524366422bac37.subject: Comment on Add refresh token support
ART-I008-CMT-87524366422bac37.body_excerpt: Code review done. One security concern: refresh tokens should be rotated on use.

ART-I008-CMT-f888056b8e665c68.subject: Comment on Add refresh token support

ART-I008-CMT-fe0cfe7c4ff03ec2.subject: Comment on Add refresh token support
